pet_notes: Use the approved third base image exactly as the identity source. Character is Haneoka Meimi in a pink off-shoulder evening gown: orange hair swept upward into a rounded formal updo/bun, NOT a short ponytail; pink bow and white rose hair ornament on top; short curled side locks only; pink choker; white opera gloves; pink sweetheart/overlapping bodice with correct chest folds; puff sleeves; wide pleated ball gown skirt with side/back bow. Keep the slightly taller corrected cute body proportions. In every side-facing or running frame, the hairstyle must remain an updo/bun silhouette with no rear ponytail tail.
style_notes: 1990s shoujo anime cel shaded pet sprite style, clean ink lines, soft painted highlights, compact readable whole-body character inside 192x208 cells.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `auto`: Infer the most appropriate pet-safe style from the user request and reference images, then keep that exact style consistent across every row.
